revision.comment: Bot: create category from de/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from dewiki title]] [[de:Category:Erbaut in den 800er Jahren]] [[commons:Category:800s architecture]] [[fa:Category:معماری دهه ۸۰۰ (میلادی)]] [[ru:Category:800-е годы в архитектуре]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ทศวรรษ 800]]
This category was created from de→Wikidata links on [[Ishizuchi Shrine]].

revision.comment: Bot: append category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from dewiki title]] [[de:Category:Erbaut in den 800er Jahren]] [[commons:Category:800s architecture]] [[fa:Category:معماری دهه ۸۰۰ (میلادی)]] [[ru:Category:800-е годы в архитектуре]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ทศวรรษ 800]]
This category was created from de→Wikidata links on [[Ishizuchi Shrine]]. [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata de]] This category was confirmed from de→Wikidata links on [[Kōyama-ji]].
